_doc: Mystery Booster 2 (MB2, released 2024-08-02) — bespoke, hand-authored recipe (NOT generated). Mystery Booster sells as a SINGLE booster type, so `authoritative` makes the set offer only this one pack and hides the Play/Draft/Collector options the date heuristic would otherwise show. Modelled like a mystery pack: cards spanning every rarity drawn from the MB2 pool, one guaranteed rare/mythic, and a closing foil. Exact per-slot odds are approximate — no official 'Collecting' article has been processed for this set yet. The single type is mapped onto the generic 'draft' opener because the UI only labels play/draft/collector; treat the label loosely.

draft.tagline: 15 reprinted cards spanning the whole game — every rarity — capped with a foil · the mystery pack
